query: SELECT mt.nome AS trimestre, mt.meses, mt.metaAgencia, v.nome, mt.meta, mt.superMeta, mt.bonusMeta, mt.bonusSuperMeta FROM metas_trimestrais mt JOIN vendedores v ON mt.vendedorId = v.id WHERE mt.nome = 'Meta Trimestral 1' ORDER BY v.nome;
